verses.text: David' sih ding hun a nai ciangin amah in a tapa Solomon thuhilhin
“Leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin a pai ding ka hi ta hi. Thakhauhin pasal na hihna kilangsak in

Amah in kei tungah a hong gen, ‘Na tapate in a lungsim khempeuh uh leh a nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh keima mai-ah thuman takin gamtat ding limtakin a ngaihsut nak uh leh Israel kumpi tokhom tungah khat beek in nang hong tamasaklo ding hi,’ ci-a a thugenna Topa in a kipsak theihna dingin, Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin Topa na Pasian' thuhilhna zui-in, ama lampite hoihtakin tawn in la, ama thukhamte, a thupiakte, a biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin zui in. Tua hi leh na heksuk na hektohna khempeuhah na dau hong pai ding hi

“Thamloin, Zeruiah' tapa Joab in kei hong bawlna, gal sunga a si mite' phu a lakna-in gal kilem hun sungin a thah, Israel galkap ukte ahi mi nih, Ner' tapa Abner leh Jether' tapa Amasa tungah a bawlna leh, amah in mawhna neilo mite thatin, tua ama gamtatna hangin ka thuaknate zong na thei hi
Tua ahih ciangin nangma pilna bangin gamta in la, lungnuam takin sih ngeina tawh amah na sihsak loh ding thei in

Ahih hangin Gilead mi Barzillai' tapate tungah thuman takin gamta in la, na sabuai-a an nete bangin amaute omsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Absalom' kiang panin ka tai lai-in amaute in tua bang thumanna tawh kei hong bawl uh hi

Mahanaim-ah ka pai lai-in a nasia samsiatna tawh kei a hong samsia, Bahurim panin a hong pai Benjamin mi Gera' tapa Shimei zong nang tawh om hi. Ahih hangin Jordan-ah keimah a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin ama tungah Topa tawh kiciamin, ‘Namsau tawh nang kong that kei ding hi,’ ka ci hi

Ahi ta zongin tu-in amah a mawhbaang loin ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang mipil na hi hi. Ama tungah na bawl dinga a kilawm na thei ngawn ding hi. Amah thatin a lutang hanah na paipihsuk ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin David si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi
Israel-te tungah David in kum sawmli sung uk hi. Amah in Hebron-ah kum sagih sung ukin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum thum sung uk hi
Tua ahih ciangin a pa David' tokhom tungah Solomon tu a, ama kumpi gam kiptakin kiphut hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Solomon in Ama Kumpi Gam Phut

verses.text: Tua ciangin Solomon' nu Bathsheba kiangah David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah hong pai hi. Tuanu in, “Thunuama hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Thunuam hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Nang tungah gen ding khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi

Adonijah in, “Kumpi gam pen keima-a' hi-in, Israel-te khempeuh in keima uk ding a lamet mahmahna uh na thei hi. Ahi zongin kumpi gam kihei-in ka sanggampa-a' suak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen Topa' kiang pan ahi hi
Tu-in nangma tung panin kong nget ding khat om hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Tuanu in ama kiangah, “Gen in,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Kumpi Solomon kiangah nong ngetsak ding kong thum hi. Amah in nang' thu hong niallo ding hi. Shunem mi Abishag ka zi dingin kei tungah hong piak ding ka ut hi,” a ci hi
Bathsheba in, “Hoih mahmah hi; kumpipa kiangah kong gensak ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Adonijah tangin ama tungah thu a gen dingin Kumpi Solomon kiangah Bathsheba va pai hi. Tua ciangin tuanu a dawn dingin kumpipa dingin tuanu mai-ah a kun hi. Tua ciangin ama tokhom tungah tu-in kumpipa' nu-a' dingin tutna khat lasak hi. Tuanu ama taklamah a tu hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma tungah na neuno khat nget ding ka nei hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Hong ngen in, nu aw; kong nial kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Shunem mi Abishag ama zi dingin na sanggampa Adonijah tungah kipia hen,” a ci hi

Kumpi Solomon in a nu dawngin, “Bang hangin Adonijah-a' dingin Shunem mi Abishag hong ngen na hi hiam? Kumpi gam zong ama-a' dingin ngetsak lai vet in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah ka u hi a, ama lamah siampi Abiathar leh Zeruiah' tapa Joab pang hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon zong Topa tawh kiciamin, “Hih thu in Adonijah' nuntakna a lei kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, kei hong kipsakin ka pa David' tokhom tungah hong koih a, ama ciamsa bangin kei tung leh ka suanlekhakte tungah kumpi gam hong pia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, tuni-in Adonijah kithat ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah sawl hi. Amah in tuapa satpuk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi

Tua ciangin siampi Abiathar' kiangah kumpipa in, “Nangma mun leh nangma gam a omna Anathoth-ah ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sih ding a kilawm ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in ka pa David' mai-ah Topa Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang na puakna leh ka pa' gimna-ah na gimkhopna hangin tutungin nang kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Topa' siampi hihna panin Abiathar hawlkhia-in, Eli innkuan tawh kisai thu Topa in Shiloh-ah a genna thu tua bangin a tungsak hi
Hih thu Joab kiang a tun' ciangin Topa' puanbukah Joab tai-in biakna tau kite a len hi. (Joab in Absalom pawlpih loin Adonijah a na pawlpihna hang ahi hi
Kumpi Solomon kiangah, “ Topa' puanbukah Joab tai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin Solomon in Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah sawlin, “Pai in; amah satpuk in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa' puanbukah Benaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa in thu hong pia a, ‘Hong paikhia in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Hilo hi, hih lai-ah kei ka sizaw ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Benaiah in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Tua bangin Joab in thu gen a, tua bangin amah in kei hong dawng hi,” a ci hi

Kumpipa in amah dawngkikin, “Ama cihsa bangin hih in; amah satlum in la phum in. Joab in thu omlopi-in mi a thahna hangin mawhna pen keima tung leh ka suanlekhakte' tung panin tua bangin na siangsak ding hi

Topa in ama mawhna ama lu tung mahah tungsak kik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David' theihloh kalin amah in Israel galkapte a uk Ner' tapa Abner leh Judah galkapte a uk Jether' tapa Amasa, amah sangin thuman zaw-in a hoihzaw ahi mihing nih do-in namsau tawh a that hi

Tua ahih ciangin mi thahna hangin gimna pen Joab' lu tung leh ama suanlekhakte' lu tungah a tawntungin hong tungkik ding hi. Ahih hangin David' tung, ama suanlekhakte' tung, ama innkuan tung, leh ama kumpi tokhom tungah Topa' kiang panin a tawntung nopna om ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah paito-in amah satpuk sukin that a, gamlak ama inn sungah amah kiphum hi
Kumpipa in Joab tangin galkapte' tungah Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah koih a, kumpipa in Abiathar' tangin siampi Zadok a koih hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “Jerusalem-ah inn khat lamin tua lai-ah teng in la, tua lai mun panin mun khat peuhpeuhah paikhia kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nang paikhia-in Kidron lui na kantan ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in; na sih leh nangma khialhna hang hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Shimei in kumpipa kiangah, “Na thugen hoih hi; ka to kumpipa' gen bangin na nasempa gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah sauveipi sung Shimei om hi
Ahih hangin kum thum a cin' ciangin Gath kumpipa Maakah' tapa Akhish kiangah Shimei' silate nih va tai uh hi. Shimei' kiangah, “En in, na silate Gath-ah om hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin
Shimei dingin la khat a van vawhin a silate a zong dingin Gath-a Akhish kiangah pai a, Gath panin a silate a ciahpih hi
Jerusalem panin Gath-ah Shimei pai-in a ciahkikna thu Solomon kiangah a kigen ciangin

kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa tawh hong kiciam sakin, thupi takin nang hong thuhilhin, ‘Nang, mun khat peuhpeuhah na paikhiat ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in,’ hong ci hilo ka hi hiam? Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Na thugen hoih hi; ka mang hi,’ na ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topa' tungah na kiciamna leh nang hong thuhilhin kong thupiakna zuilo na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua banah kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Ka pa David tungah siatna na bawlte khempeuh na lungsimah na thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in nangma siatna nangma lu tung mahah hong tun'kik ding hi
Ahih hangin Kumpi Solomon thupha kipia-in, a tawntungin Topa' mai-ah a tokhom kikipsak ding hi,” zong a ci lai hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah thu pia hi. Amah paikhia-in Shimei satpuk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi. Tua ahih ciangin Solomon' khutsungah kumpi gam kikipsak hi.
